TeamA_Id.description: The TeamID of Team A. Note: Team A is determined by the home team in the first leg, and remains set through the life of the record

TeamA_AggregateScore.description: The score, on aggregate, of Team A in the matchup. Note: Team A is determined by the home team in the first leg, and remains set through the life of the record

TeamB_Id.description: The TeamID of Team B. Note: Team B is determined by the away team in the first leg, and remains set through the life of the record

TeamB_AggregateScore.description: The score, on aggregate, of Team B in the matchup. Note: Team B is determined by the away team in the first leg, and remains set through the life of the record

WinningTeamId.description: The ID of the team that wins the home-and-home matchup

Created.description: Date and time the record was created (in US Eastern Time)

Updated.description: The timestamp of when the record was last updated (in US Eastern Time)
